creator: sblachmann@gmail.com
text:
Thank you, this works!

Regarding the teken colors, I found this
https://git.furworks.de/opensourcemirror/opnsense-src/commit/233ab015c0d735089bd6863f8d0a0fd25b62c2a6
which indicates that, alternatively to the color numbers, there can be used the english color names, too.

Maybe this should be added to the documentation (manpage, handbook) as well.

Imho the other vt newcons configuration options mentioned here
https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-current/2021-January/078090.html
also would deserve being documented.
